name: Muffaletta
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Clove garlic, peeled and finely minced, or forced through a press
2 Anchovy fillets, rinsed and patted dry
Freshly ground black pepper to taste
8 oz Thinly sliced cooked turkey or chicken breast
8 oz Thinly sliced black forest ham
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the foccaccia according to package directions. Cool and slice into halves.
2. In a bowl, combine the minced garlic, artichoke hearts, black and green olives, anchovies, capers, oregano, cayenne pepper, and black pepper. Mix until finely chopped.
3. Spread half of the olive relish on the bottom half of the foccaccia. Top with layers of turkey or chicken, provolone cheese, and ham. Spread the remaining olive relish over the top and replace with the top of the foccaccia.
4. Wrap the foccaccia in foil, place in a refrigerator, and weigh down with a couple of cans. Chill several hours or overnight. Cut into wedges before serving. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
